title: Legacy4J bedrock tooltips
description: Retextures the icons of the controls for Legacy4J.
body:
![Title (new)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff5cf665c902f3f3740fdc9e1f076d6dd886774a.png)

## Note: the project has been completely updated and now offers new designs for PS and Switch.
just retextures the icons for the tooltips.
This pack was made for myself and just for fun. (Despite the fact that I worked on it all day and night, without proper sleep. So yeah, something like that.)

Made for the mod Legacy4J.
